title: Diane Griffiths
text:
Faculty directory observation
Name: Diane Griffiths
Snapshot: 2026-07-21
biography: B.S. from University of Delaware, M.S.S. from Bryn Mawr College (Social Work), Ph.D. in Social Welfare Policy in '2000 from Brandeis University
education_entries: Ph D in Social Policy, Brandeis University
MSS in Social Work, Bryn Mawr College
BS in Community and Family Studies, University of Delaware
teaching_interests: Social Policy, Macro Social Work, Research Methods, Statistics
publications: Journal Article, Academic Journal (2024). Moving from Darkness to Light: Social Work Students' Reflections on COVID-19 in Practice and the Future of the Profession . Field Educator. Volume, 14.1. Issue, Spring 2024. Pages, 1-22.
Journal Article, Academic Journal (2018). Primary Integration Outcomes in a Newly Resettled Bhutanese Refugee Community . International Social Work. Pages, 17.

Presentations: Diane Griffiths, Marianna Ferguson, The Association for Baccalaureate Social Work Program Directors Annual Conference, "Mental Health Needs Among Students at a Small, Public, Liberal Arts University," Atlanta, GA. (2018)
